resnet50_vs_svm_improved.note2: Borderline significant. DL consistently outperforms improved SVM by ~5 points across all seeds.

svm_improved_vs_svm_basic.note2: Improved SVM consistently better (+3.35% mean) but not significant with 3 seeds.

svm_improved_vs_published_chamoli.note: Our improved SVM mean 92.55% vs published 91.01% (single number, no variance available)
svm_improved_vs_published_chamoli.comparison: Our improved SVM exceeds published benchmark by 1.54 percentage points. All 3 seeds individually beat 91.01% (94.51, 91.21, 91.94).
